section_title: God Will Dwell among the People

versions.label: BSB
paragraphs: 45 Then I will dwell among the Israelites and be their God. 46 And they will know that I am the LORD their God, who brought them out of the land of Egypt so that I might dwell among them.
I am the LORD their God.

context_lines: In **Exodus 29**, this section should be read within the flow of the chapter and the larger movement of Exodus.
common_interpretation_lines: A common reading of **God Will Dwell among the People** is that it should be interpreted in light of the chapter's full narrative movement rather than as an isolated proof text.
Where interpreters differ on details, the immediate setting in **Exodus 29** remains the first control on meaning.
